channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The final days of the Tesla Model X and S are here. All bets are on the Cybercab.
item.description: It's new era for Tesla — and one that will rely on its ability to launch the Cybercab and mass produce the Optimus robot.

item.title: Volkswagen CEO Is Standing Up for Physical Buttons in Cars
item.description: CEO Thomas Schäfer calls physical controls in cars "non-negotiable" after years of infotainment dominance.

item.title: 32 Go de RAM et ray tracing boosté : la Nvidia GeForce RTX 6090 commence à faire parler d’elle
item.description: Nvidia n'a rien de prévu pour nos PC cette année, mais les labos de Santa Clara ne chôment pas. Une fuite massive détaille les ambitions de la future série RTX 60 : une bande passante doublée et un ray tracing enfin mature.

item.title: Lowe's just launched a massive spring sale — here's everything I'd buy for my backyard, including furniture, plants, grills, and more
item.description: The Lowe's 2026 SpringFest sale is live, and I'm rounding up all the best deals on backyard essentials, including patio furniture, grills, tools, lawnmowers, and more.

item.title: Trump labor board tells Amazon to negotiate with Staten Island warehouse union
item.description: The Trump administration's labor board has ordered Amazon to recognize and bargain with the International Brotherhood of Teamsters union, which represents workers at a warehouse in Staten Island. This is just the latest chapter in a multiyear standoff between Staten Island warehouse workers and Amazon, according to a report by The Washington Post. The union has been trying to bring Amazon to the bargaining table for years to negotiate pay, benefits and workplace safety. The labor board's proclamation doesn't mean that the battle is over. It's highly likely this will be settled in court. An Ama...

item.title: That Teenage Bout of Mono May Have a Troubling Second Act
item.description: Scientists are uncovering a possible link between teenage mononucleosis and a chronic condition years later.

item.title: 'Copilot is for entertainment purposes only': Even Microsoft's official terms and conditions say you really shouldn't be using its AI at work
item.description: Microsoft notes Copilot is for "entertainment purposes only" and to be used "at your own risk," but nothing has changed to its availability.

item.title: CorelDRAW Graphics Suite 2026 review: An impressive collection of creative software for PC and Mac — now with added AI
item.description: CorelDRAW Graphics Suite 2026 is here, and what does this powerful collection of software bring to the budding artist? Well a lot of AI actually. If you want to see if this new version is right for you, read on

item.title: We Landed on Mars, A.K.A. the Set of ‘For All Mankind’
item.description: io9 visited Mars Mission Control, located on a studio lot in Los Angeles, to talk season five of the Apple TV show.

item.title: Battlefield 6 audio director explains there's 'a lot of demand' for high-quality soundtracks — 'We're following suit with the rest of the entertainment industries'
item.description: Battlefield 6 audio director Jeff Wilson has discussed the game's award-winning sound in a new interview.

item.title: 'A guy who was not an expert...used ChatGPT to make a custom mRNA vaccine for his dog's cancer', and other incredible tales from Sam Altman
item.description: OpenAI CEO shared stories of some incredible ChatGPT and CODEX successes, but what do they mean for you (and your doing)?

item.title: Google dévoile 4 IA qui peuvent tourner sur votre smartphone ou votre ordinateur, sans Internet
item.description: Avec Gemma 4, Google propose 4 intelligences artificielles en open source, dotées chacune de performances spécifiques. L’entreprise américaine se positionne dorénavant comme un concurrent de poids face à des géants chinois comme DeepSeek et Qwen (Alibaba).

item.title: Europe’s cyber agency blames hacking gangs for massive data breach and leak
item.description: CERT-EU blamed the cybercrime group TeamPCP for the recent hack on the European Commission, and said the notorious ShinyHunters gang was responsible for leaking the stolen data online.

item.title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is a black hole of entertainment
item.description: I realized something was genuinely wrong with The Super Mario Galaxy Movie about 30 minutes in: I hadn't laughed even once. My audience of around 15 people, including a few families, was dead silent as well. The guy sitting behind me, a Nintendo fan decked out in Mario gear, was so bored he fell asleep. Sure, this is made for kids, but as a Nintendo devotee myself, and someone who has to watch a ton of children's films on repeat, even the Despicable Me films are more entertaining. To be fair, there's the pretense of a plot: Koopa Jr. and Peach are on parallel tracks to reconnect with a sense o...

item.title: Amazon Prime Video en avril 2026 : c’est le grand final pour The Boys !
item.description: Amazon a dévoilé les nouveautés qui arrivent sur Prime Video en avril, et s'il y en a bien une qui est attendue avec impatience, c'est la saison finale de The Boys. Mais voyons également ce qu'il y a d'autre au programme.

item.title: Pourquoi la consommation sera le critère le plus important des voitures électriques (devant l’autonomie)
item.description: Si on a l'habitude des étiquettes énergie pour les voitures thermiques, elles n'existent pour le moment pas pour les véhicules électriques, qui sont simplement catégorisés A avec 0 g/CO2 par kilomètre, comme si elles étaient toutes pareilles. Pourtant, on imagine que dans le futur, la consommation d'une électrique sera l'un des points déterminants. Faisons le point. ...

item.title: Hims and Hers reveal cyberattack — customer support system hacked and personal info stolen, here's what we know
item.description: At least 500 people were affected in breach at Hims and Hers.

item.title: Mercedes adds steer-by-wire — and a dang steering yoke — to the EQS
item.description: Steer-by-wire, in which a car can be steered electronically rather than through a physical connection between the steering wheel and steering rack, is coming to Mercedes-Benz. The German automaker says it will use the steering technology in its forthcoming refreshed EQS sedan, marking its first foray into the world of steer-by-wire. Steer-by-wire systems replace traditional […]...

item.title: Des trous noirs manquent à l’appel : les ondes gravitationnelles révèlent pourquoi
item.description: Une des conséquences remarquables de l’astronomie des ondes gravitationnelles est qu’elle ne permet pas seulement de faire de l’astrophysique relativiste, mais aussi de tester des prédictions issues de l’astrophysique nucléaire et de la physique des particules. On en voit un exemple avec des...

item.title: Artemis 2 Astronaut Offers Powerful Perspective on Going to the Moon Amid War
item.description: Why go to the Moon when there are so many problems to fix here on Earth? Artemis 2 mission pilot Victor Glover explained earlier today from cislunar space.

item.title: Un TV OLED 4K de 65″ à moins de 1 000 € ? C’est possible, la preuve avec ce récent TV Samsung
item.description: Le TV 4K Samsung TQ65S85F est un modèle d'entrée de gamme, certes, mais il embarque tout de même une belle dalle OLED, des ports HDMI 2.1 et offre même une fréquence de rafraîchissement jusqu'à 120 Hz. Un modèle complet que vous trouverez à 999,99 euros au lieu de 1 499,99 euros chez Carrefour.

item.title: The best smartwatch youve never heard of is on sale for less than $50
item.description: The Nothing CMF Watch 3 Pro is on sale at Woot (an Amazon company) for only $44.99. That's 55% off and its best price ever.

item.title: Age-verification is hurting sex educators and sex workers, studies suggest
item.description: Age-verification laws are impacting sex educators' work and decreasing sex workers' incomes, separate surveys suggest.

item.title: Test de la Delta 3 Classic : EcoFlow fait le choix de l’essentiel à prix réduit
item.description: Avec la Delta 3 Classic, EcoFlow s'attaque à un segment qu'elle délaissait jusqu'ici : celui des stations d'énergie portables à moins de 600 €. En retirant la prise allume-cigare et en réduisant l'entrée solaire, le fabricant parvient à proposer 1 800 W de puissance et 1 024 Wh de capacité dans un format de 12 kg, à 549 € en prix de lancement.

item.title: Anker’s small, five-port travel adapter is down to its best price yet
item.description: Few things kill the vibe of your relaxing spring break abroad faster than realizing you forgot a way to keep things charged. Anker’s Nano Travel Adapter makes it easy to charge your phone, camera, e-readers, and other devices anywhere you travel. Right now, you can buy it at its all-time low of $19.99 ($6 off) […]

item.title: Reddit r/all takes another step into the grave
item.description: Reddit has finally killed all links to r/all, though there is still one way to access the popular feed.

item.title: Parents: A valuable source of AI intelligence
item.description: The future of AI may be hiding in a messy living room at 2 a.m. If you want to understand where AI-assisted parenting is headed, skip the research lab and look into a messy living room at 2 a.m. Some of the most revealing use cases are happening in the homes of AI engineers who have just become parents.

item.title: Now Even A24 Is Clowning on Netflix’s Handling of ‘Steel Ball Run’
item.description: 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' fans have been far from quiet about the anime not having a weekly release on Netflix.

item.title: Here are the 5 most impactful financial freebies every investor should claim
item.description: There are legal provisions that allow you to generate income, tax free. In the world of tax law, truly “free” lunches are rare. Usually, a tax break in one area requires a sacrifice in another. However, if you know where to look, the tax code contains several freebies—legal provisions that allow you to increase wealth, generate income, and gift money without the IRS taking a single penny.Here are five of the most powerful financial freebies available to investors today....

item.title: John Perry Barlow, JFK Jr., and a Night of Grief I Can’t Forget
item.description: Watching Love Story brought back a surreal evening in 1994.

item.title: I saved a doomed Windows laptop by embracing Linux
item.description: Two weeks ago I set aside my M4 MacBook Air and picked up a nine-year-old ThinkPad. It's one of an estimated 200 to 400 million Windows 10 PCs that don't meet Microsoft's requirements for Windows 11. When Microsoft officially ended support for Windows 10 in October, it became "obsolete." The solution, according to Microsoft, is […]

item.title: Ten years ago Acer debuted its awesomely ridiculous $10K gaming laptop – how well does it hold up in 2026?
item.description: Two Nvidia GTX 1080 GPUs, a 21-inch screen, and a $10K price tag - the Acer Predator 21X was a ridiculous device 10 years ago, and I fired it up to see how it fares today.

item.title: Disney+ en avril 2026 : The Testaments, le retour de Malcolm, une série Star Wars sur Maul… Voici ce qu’il ne faut pas manquer !
item.description: Vous voulez encore des séries originales Disney+ ? Et bien en voilà tout plein ! La plateforme de streaming vient de dévoiler son line-up d'avril avec entre autres une nouvelle série Star Wars ainsi que la suite de La Servante Écarlate.

item.title: RAM Prices Are Killing Small Gaming Devices
item.description: Lenovo's gaming handhelds and tablets, and several smaller handheld devices, are all suffering, and AI is to blame.
